name: echo3D
description: Cloud platform for 3D asset management that streams, updates and delivers 3D/AR/VR content across ARKit, ARCore, WebXR and Unity.

seo.title: echo3D — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: echo3D: Cloud platform for 3D asset management that streams, updates and delivers 3D/AR/VR content across ARKit, ARCore, WebXR and Unity.

when_to_use: Managing 3D asset libraries with CDN delivery for AR/VR apps
Streaming 3D models to ARKit/ARCore apps on-demand
Over-the-air content updates for deployed AR experiences
Building WebXR apps with remotely hosted 3D assets
Version-controlled 3D asset management for game and AR teams

pros: Works with Unity, Unreal, WebXR, ARKit
Version control and rollback for assets
Free tier for developers and education
cons: Pricing tiers unclear for mid-size teams
Web viewer feature set trails Sketchfab
3D optimization pipeline is a black box
review.verdict: Useful if you ship AR/VR at scale — a Cloudinary for 3D — but most projects can get by with plain CDN.
review.best_for: AR/VR apps and e-commerce needing optimized 3D delivery across ARKit/ARCore/WebXR.
review.not_for: Simple 3D viewers — a CDN plus draco compression suffices.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
